---
title: "Notes"
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

Reference notes on SQL, AWS (RDS and CDK), and Pixi for use in the tidywf ecosystem.

```{r}
#| label: vars
#| echo: false
dir1 <- system.file("doc-templates", "notes", package = "nemo")
```

## SQL

```{asis, file=file.path(dir1, "sql.md")}
#| label: child-sql
```

## AWS RDS

```{asis, file=file.path(dir1, "rds.md")}
#| label: child-rds
```


## AWS CDK

```{asis, file=file.path(dir1, "cdk.md")}
#| label: child-cdk
```

## Pixi

```{asis, file=file.path(dir1, "pixi.md")}
#| label: child-pixi
```
